reviews.title: Garbage.
reviews.text: This is without a doubt the most disappointing thing I have purchased on amazon. The picture in the display makes it look like the mouse has a little bit of sparkle and a fuchsia lip stamp on it. It’s the cheapest crap I have ever seen. The picture on the mouse looks like it was blown up way to large to fit on the mouse. It feels like cheap plastic and for $20 I really could have bought something much nicer. I am not happy with this at all. It’s not worth one star. Update!!! The clickers are backwards so now when I go to select something it opens up the small menu the way it would if you right click. This is completely trash. So disappointing.

title: 【Upgrade】 LED Wireless Mouse, Rechargeable Slim Silent Mouse 2.4G Portable Mobile Optical Office Mouse with USB & Type-c Receiver, 3 Adjustable DPI for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Desktop (White)
features: 【LED Design】The upgraded version mouse with the LED lights adds more fun to the boring office life. The bottom of the mouse has a switch, you can switch lights freely. Low-key or sparkle, switch in one second, suitable for any occasion.

【Rechargeable Optical Mouse】Built-in durable rechargeable battery, it can be easily charged using the included USB cable without replacing the battery. Just 2 hours charging, you can use it about 7-15 days. Standby time is very long, energy-saving features, automatic sleep mode and wake-up mode are installed to save energy. Turn off the mouse LED light when not in use to save power.

【Plug and Play】No need to install any driver, just plug the USB receiver into your laptop will the mouse start to serve. 2.4GHz wireless technology provides powerful and reliable connection, effective up to 10 meters of range. Advanced optical tracking technology with fast click and responsiveness. 3-Level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600 DPI), freely to satisfy daily work. Equipped with USB-C to USB adapter, let you worry-free use of any device.

【Mute Click & Comfortable Hand-feeling】Silent click Mouse with classic design with anti-fingerprint finish offers your hand maximum support and comfort. Silent button reduces 90% noises, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for office, conference room, cafe, library, bedroom, help you concentrate on your work, study without disturbing others besides you. Ultra-thin, ergonomic design, lightweight and convenient for carrying or traveling.

【Wide Compatibility】Well compatible with Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, and 10 / Windows Vista / Windows Vista/ Windows ME etc, Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices. Please Note: If your laptop just with type-c port, You need connect the supplied USB-C to USB adapter to your laptop and plug the USB receiver in to it.

reviews.title: Comfortable to use as my everyday mouse.
reviews.text: I bought this Tecknet dual mode Bluetooth and 2.4 G mouse to replace a similar design 2.4 G only model. Although it works well after the Bluetooth connects, it can sometimes take a minute or so to connect with my Asus C302C Chromebook; other times it connects immediately. I don't really understand why. I think 4-1/2 stars is the right rating for this one. The connection issue is mildly irritating, but not a showstopper. I do recommend this mouse.

title: Wireless Mouse, 2.4Ghz Wireless Mouse Computer Mouse 1200DPI,6 Buttons with Nano Receiver for Laptop,PC,Chromebook,Computer,Notebook,Office (Grey)
description: How to connect: Step1:open the battery cover,then install the two AAA battery . Step2:Take out the USB dongle and close the battery cover . Step3:Plug the USB dongle in the USB port . Step4:Place your wireless mouse close to the dongle about 30CM,turn the power switch button to "ON", the led light will light up.Your mouse will connect with the dongle automatically and start working . Notice if the mouse doesn't work ,please place the mouse near to the dongle and press the connect button (underneath the mouse)and release ,it wll connect to work . Package details Wireless mouse x1 USB nano receiver x1
features: System support: Windows,Android/Linux office/Mac OS device.
Wireless Mouse :RF2.4G wireless transmission distance of up to 10m.
Easy operation: USB nano dongle and power switch ,more convenient when plug in USB ,Plug and Play make all the operation more easier than others.
with 800/1200 CPI switch ,press left+mid+right button for switching ,2.4Ghz wireless ,1200cpi optical technology.

reviews.title: Good Basic Mouse
reviews.text: It serves the purpose intended. A good, basic wired replacement mouse.

reviews.title: Mouse in the house.
reviews.text: Works properly as it should, couldn’t beat the price.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

reviews.title: Wonderful mouse for the price!
reviews.text: I love this mouse! It fits perfectly in my hand, and the usb Bluetooth works great with no issues. The clicks are silent, but the scroller click is not silent. This is fine for me since I don’t use my scroller to click very often, but if that bothers you, I thought it was important to point out.

reviews.title: Lightweight and Responsive
reviews.text: This little mouse is nice and responsive. I really enjoy using it. It's comfortable, too. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Not what I expected.
reviews.text:
It’s super super lightweight and feels very cheap. It comes with no instructions what so ever. It comes with a little usb input and so I plug it into my Chromebook and put in one AA battery. I flip the switch to on and it starts glowing red. I don’t know what the red light means, again, no instructions. Are the batteries dead? Is it not connected? No idea.
I open up the Bluetooth menu and it’s scanning and nothing is coming up and then I realize the cursor is moving with the mouse. I start rolling it around and it has horrible traction. It’s not a smooth motion as you’d expect from a mouse. Again, maybe my batteries were low, maybe the connection was low, I can’t say, although I switched out the batteries about 3 times and I doubt all 3 batteries were close to dead. I bought this for my sons online homework that he has to do, it consist of a lot of dragging items to designated locations on the screen and he’s been having difficulty using the mouse pad on the Chromebook . But it’s so flimsy, my daughter picked it up and lost it amongst the mess of toys and I don’t even feel at a loss.

reviews.title: Sleek and Elegant
reviews.text: This Mouse is a perfect match for our white Cherry keyboard. It has all the basic functions you need without the fancy programable buttons that some gaming people use. We find it exacting in use when we do retouching in Photoshop and movements are precise, with the nano receiver, and fast all the time. This is a good basic mouse to use every day on any computer. It's attractive and fits your hand comfortably.

reviews.title: Worked straight out the box
reviews.text: Small and comfortable. Easy to set up and use. Great value.

reviews.title: Too cute!
reviews.text: Turned out the same color as I saw on my screen when I ordered it!!! So excited it matched the mouse pad I ordered too! Love it, works perfectly!

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: I was looking for something a bit angled because my wrist was feeling uncomfortable but I didn't want an extreme twist to the side. I've always used Logitech mice but this has been working great. I wish it had a couple more buttons on it so I could set a button to heal and one to my 4th skill but otherwise it's just what I needed. It goes to sleep when you don't use it and wakes up when you click so I don't have to turn it off. And it's blurple, the best color.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

reviews.title: Perfect Standard Mouse
reviews.text: This LeadsaiL 2.4G Wireless Mouse works great.  My girlfriend dropped her mouse and needed a replacement quickly - this was perfect.  It takes 1 AA battery and connected right to her laptop.  It is a standard wireless laptop mouse - works great!

reviews.title: Leadsail is my brand
reviews.text: Leadsail is my go to brand for quality computer mice.  This is the fifth one I have gotten and they all work flawlessly.  This one is slightly more compact in design but their trademark always is an ergonomically satisfying fit in the hand.  I am left handed but use my right hand for the mouse.  I have rather large hands and this mouse is perfect to grip and maneuver.  It also is indeed silent which is not really an issue for me.  What I look for is design, function and durability and you get that with all Leadsail products.  Recommend.

reviews.title: precise since I use it for Photoshop
reviews.text: precise and long lasting

reviews.title: Best mouse
reviews.text: This is by far the best mouse I've ever owned, (and I've tried a lot of different makes and models). I have several, actually, one for my work computer, one each for my home computers and another one for an ASUS tablet/laptop. I also have several in "reserve" in case one fails, which doesn't happen often, if at all. Overall, a great mouse and a great value. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: A great wireless mouse. Love it.

reviews.title: Best mouse out there
reviews.text: I've used these for a few years now and I don't know that there's a better mouse on the market. Battery life is amazing, size if a perfect mix of full functions and laptop packing size. Recommended for any purpose though.

reviews.title: Corel Office
reviews.text: Only purchased because it stated it was "like" Microsoft. But I should have read closer, It stated it was compatible with Microsoft. Still, the software is easy to use and installs without problem. Great starter for maybe the high school student wanting to learn basics. For my deeper needs in business, it is a little light but starting with Corel then transferring to Microsoft files are very easy and NO data is lost as of yet. I do say it is a good value

reviews.title: Sucks, Slow, Terrible, Missing pieces.
reviews.text:
Extremely slow unless you know how to disable 50 or so features that run off the bat. The mouse came with no bluetooth adapter, and this doesn't have built in bluetooth.
Seriously don't buy HP.

1 hour of ownership update: It's stopped opening windows. It brings up the login screen, then I get a black screen. The computer no longer works and I've done nothing to it. There are several other reviews referring to this issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: so far its a great buy. I like it

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse, Rechargeable Slient Multi-Device Computer Mice (Tri-Mode: BT1/2+2.4Ghz) with USB Receiver, Ergonomic Cordless Mouse for Laptop/MacBook/PC/iPad(Mint Green to Purple)

reviews.title: False advertisement
reviews.text:
See attached image. This is what you get. Colors of the actual item and the color of the advertised item. Not even close. Mouse itself is "ok" at best. DPI button makes noise like it is a mouse straight from 1990s. Item returned.

Update: Seller reached out to me and sent out a replacement, white and blue version. Mouse received and the colors are true to the image. DPI button needs improvement and the seller has promised to continue working on that feature. Otherwise can only say that it was a proper and appreciated gesture from the seller. Score updated to 4/5 for customer service.

reviews.title: Perfect Mouse for size and function!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:765cefcf509f1ae4e5ecc0b46111d5ea]] Pros - lots of practical features such as soft click, back/fwd, click scroll wheel for multi directional pointer, also connects to multiple devices at the same time. Battery life is great as well and it also works while charging. Price is so good I bought a couple of them for my home office and work office as well as gifts for co-workers. Looks great on desk as well.

Cons - None really but the feet on the bottom have tiny invisible plastic packaging wrap on them that has to be peeled off or it becomes old and sticky making mouse hard to move. Took me a hot minute to figure this out.

reviews.title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
reviews.text:
RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
Great mouse. USB C re-chargeable. Can run in bluetooth or RF mode. Lights up so can see when lights are off. Feels great. Compact but not to compact, is still comfortable and ergonomical.
Affordable.
I used to buy the well known name brand mouse that can cost 2 to 4 times the price. With the competitor mouse after about 6 to 12 months it would start to double click. I now feel maybe that is "planned obsolence", so I will no longer buy that mouse.
The main shortcuts I use are forward and back which are already on two side buttons. I then also use Start + D for Desktop, so I can do that with this mouse.
Liked it so much bought 2 more for my other laptops / backups.
Great mouse.

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
